opportunities.title: Facilities Consolidation: Multi-Geography Coworking Stack
opportunities.implementation_summary: Consolidate 7 separate coworking/flexible office providers across UK, Belgium, Croatia, India, and Singapore onto 2 global vendors (e.g., WeWork + IWG/Regus) with enterprise pricing. Standardize lease terms, eliminate duplicate admin overhead, and negotiate volume discounts.
opportunities.risk_notes: Local employees may resist workspace changes; requires staggered rollout and lease alignment timing.

opportunities.title: Salesforce License Right-Sizing and Tier Optimization
opportunities.implementation_summary: Audit Salesforce user licenses (likely over-provisioned Enterprise/Unlimited seats), downgrade inactive/light users to lower tiers, eliminate unused Sales Cloud/Service Cloud seats, and renegotiate renewal based on actual usage. Typical enterprise customers carry 20-30% license bloat.
opportunities.risk_notes: Sales team may push back if perceived as capability reduction; requires usage audit first.

opportunities.title: Professional Services Consolidation: Advisory and Recruitment
opportunities.implementation_summary: Consolidate accounting advisory (BDO) and four separate recruitment agencies onto 2 preferred partners with master service agreements. Negotiate volume discounts on recruitment contingency fees (reduce from 20-25% to 15-18%) and lock in advisory retainer pricing.
opportunities.risk_notes: Specialized recruiters (e.g., Mason Frank for Salesforce roles) may be needed tactically; ensure MSA allows flexibility.
